evals.prompt: 帮我做个东西，能分析销售数据
evals.expected_output: A refined prompt that clarifies the sales data analysis tool requirements, including data sources, analysis types, user audience, and deliverable format.
expectations: The refined prompt mentions data sources (e.g., CSV, database, API)
The refined prompt specifies analysis types or metrics
The refined prompt identifies target users or audience
The refined prompt defines deliverable format (e.g., web app, script, report)
The refined prompt includes timeline or constraints

evals.prompt: I need a script to process some files, you know, make them better
evals.expected_output: A detailed prompt that identifies file types, processing goals, improvement criteria, and technical constraints for the file processing script.
expectations: The refined prompt specifies file types (e.g., images, documents)
The refined prompt defines processing operations (e.g., resize, compress, convert)
The refined prompt mentions batch processing or scale
The refined prompt includes technical stack or language preference
The refined prompt addresses quality criteria or improvement metrics

evals.prompt: 帮我improve一下我的website，让它更专业
evals.expected_output: A comprehensive prompt that clarifies website improvement areas (design, content, performance), target audience, professionalism criteria, and implementation constraints.
expectations: The refined prompt identifies design improvement areas (e.g., layout, colors, typography)
The refined prompt mentions content updates or additions
The refined prompt addresses responsiveness or mobile compatibility
The refined prompt defines professionalism criteria (e.g., modern, trustworthy)
The refined prompt includes timeline or implementation constraints
